django__django-16502.note: Scaffold version is higher quality: no syntax error, test actually ran

key_findings: Pipeline works end-to-end: agent → Docker → patch → swebench harness → binary pass/fail
Scaffold was injected in 2/5 instances (40%) when edit errors detected
IndentationError is the dominant failure mode for gpt-4o-mini (4/6 evaluated patches)
In django-14017, scaffold produced a patch where control was empty (qualitative improvement)
In django-16502, scaffold patch was syntactically valid (test ran) while control had IndentationError
Zero resolve rate with gpt-4o-mini is expected — SWE-bench Verified baseline for this model is ~5%
With a stronger model (gpt-4.1 or claude-sonnet-4), scaffold effect would be more visible
next_steps: Run with gpt-4.1 for higher base resolve rate
Increase to 20-30 EDIT instances for statistical significance
Add earlier scaffold injection (after first failed command, not just edit errors)
Compare scaffold injection timing: early vs late
